projectDescription: A Terra pack that creates a completely underground world with several unique caves to explore within.
keyFeatures: 14 unique underground cave biomes with distinct themes and generation
Advanced 3D noise-based cave carving with spaghetti, cheese, and mega cave systems
Customizable biome distribution and scaling parameters
Drop-in merge capability to add caves to existing Terra packs
Custom terrain palettes, features, and decorations for each biome
Configurable Y-level ranges and strata layers
publicApiSurface: global-scale - Modifies the scale of all biomes
cave-scale - Controls the scale of cave foundations
cave-biome-scale - Controls the scale of cave biome placement
substratum-carving-max - Controls max height of cave generation
substratum-carving-min - Controls min height of cave generation
cave-biome-max - Controls max height of cave biome generation
cave-biome-min - Controls min height of cave biome generation
strata.deepslate.top - Y level where deepslate begins
strata.bedrock.top - Y level where bedrock begins
